title: Fisheye Shaders
description: A shaderpack that simulates fisheye lenses.
body:
___**This shaderpack may cause symptoms such as 3D motion sickness while playing. If you experience such symptoms, please stop playing immediately.**___  
This shaderpack provides a 180-degree fisheye lens effect based on the vanilla graphics. It is created by stitching together images from five different camera angles.  
This shaderpack is not compatible with the Iris mod. I am unsure of the cause of this issue and therefore unable to resolve it.

![Fisheye](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ca9767d1be4e6df33b8d21ddb0e569cd1a7ab8a_0.webp)
